title: delete should be preferred only with object properties
description: The delete operator is used to remove a property from an object. It only affects its own properties. There are two valid ways to remove a property: Using the dot notation: delete object.property Using the bracket notation: delete object[property] delete will throw a TypeError in strict mode if the property is a non-configurable property.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Delete operator should only be used with object properties, not variables or functions
